summary: A Go-based monolithic testing and validation framework utilizing MCP handlers and heavily augmented by automated AI agent-generated test suites.
concerns: High volume of auto-generated 'extra tests' from glm-agents suggests potential test bloat or flakiness
Deeply nested agent-generated directory structures (GOrchestra/glm-agents/) pollute the repository
Recent SMTP double-handshake bug indicates fragile protocol state management
suggestions: Consolidate or prune redundant agent-generated extra test files to maintain CI performance
Move GOrchestra agent metadata and artifacts out of the main source tree into a separate workspace or .gitignored directory
Focus on hardening protocol-level assertions (like SMTP) to prevent state machine regressions
